files.patch:
@@ -214,3 +214,1 @@
-         * comment, but which do not have {@code @Deprecated} annotation, or about
-         * items which have {@code @Deprecated} annotation, but the annotation has
-         * no effect there.
+         * comment, but which do not have {@code @Deprecated} annotation.

@@ -211,2 +211,1 @@
-    Warn about items marked as deprecated in JavaDoc but not using the @Deprecated annotation\n\
-    or about items marked with the @Deprecated annotation but the annotation has no effect there.
+    Warn about items marked as deprecated in JavaDoc but not using the @Deprecated annotation.

@@ -595,2 +595,1 @@
-        without the `@Deprecated` annotation or about the items marked with the
-        `@Deprecated` annotation but the annotation has no effect there.
+        without the `@Deprecated` annotation.
@@ -1639,3 +1638,1 @@
-    comment, but do not have the `@Deprecated` annotation, or about items
-    that have `@Deprecated` annotation, but the annotation has no effect
-    there, for example:
+    comment, but do not have the `@Deprecated` annotation, for example:
@@ -1648,3 +1645,1 @@
-    public static void newMethod() {
-        @Deprecated int i = 0;
-    }
+    public static void newMethod() { }

@@ -6,1 +6,1 @@
- * @compile/fail/ref=DeprecatedAnnotationTest.out -Werror -XDrawDiagnostics package-info.java
+ * @compile/fail/ref=DeprecatedAnnotationTest.out -Werror -Xlint:deprecation -XDrawDiagnostics package-info.java
@@ -27,1 +27,1 @@
-        @SuppressWarnings("dep-ann")  // verify that we are able to suppress.
+        @SuppressWarnings("deprecation")  // verify that we are able to suppress.

@@ -2,1 +2,1 @@

+ * Copyright (c) 2007, 2016, Oracle and/or its affiliates. All rights reserved.
@@ -100,1 +100,0 @@
-        args.add("-Xlint:-dep-ann");
